reviews.review_description: Abandonware and outtdated to the point where its completely useless because even the old avatar doesn't show up anymore.
Please save this app by updating the avatars to the newer ones! God bless
simple and nice but how can I change the avatar within the app???

I would love to see the avatars updating! You are helping us build at HealthTech BR! 

Good job

I love the app, i love the possibility of exporting your avatar, but my avatar is not updating at all with the changes, idk how can I sort this out. Also, how or from where can I import some environments? I need to do a major project, and I'd love to use and promote your app.

Please get in touch with me if possible 🙏
How do you change the avatar mine dies not show me but other then that it seems very good

Unfortunately I've been waiting for one of these to come around just be met with this one sad it has potential but it shouldn't be out right now it's so flawed can't do nothing really in it everything's broken nothing makes sense the person that rated it five stars probably one of the Developers cuz this is not no five star five star piece of crap if anything but it's a five-star piece of crap that could have potential we'll see where the developers go with it but if this is it then no way I should be able to sue for false advertising!"

developer_response.body: Hey, do you happen to have concrete feedback on what you'd like to see improved?
